name: Mango Ice Cream - Whnp81a
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the mango.
2. Cut the pulp from the seed; discard the seed.
3. In a blender or food processor fitted with a metal blade, puree the mango pulp with lemon juice.
4. In a medium saucepan, combine cornstarch and sugar. Stir in half and half, beaten egg yolk, and corn syrup.
5. Cook over medium heat, stirring until bubbly. Cook for 1 minute longer.
6. Allow to cool.
7. Stir in the pureed mango.
8. Pour into an ice cream canister.
9. Freeze according to manufacturer's directions.
Makes about 1 quart.
Per Serving: 131 calories - 2 g. protein - 19 g. carb. - 6 g. fat
~ 43 mg. chol. - 56 mg. calcium.
